name: shortly-worker
description: Privacy-first, self-hosted URL shortener with click analytics, QR codes, and an owner-only admin dashboard for Cloudflare Workers and D1.

API_KEY.description: Optional. Protects the admin-facing /api/links, /api/stats, and /api/export endpoints. Use `openssl rand -hex 32` to generate one. Leave unset for open/dev mode; the public /:slug redirect and QR endpoints are never gated by this key.

DB.description: Required. D1 database binding created via `wrangler d1 create url-shortener-db`. Stores links, clicks, and settings — see migrations/0001_initial.sql.
